warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
3x3 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 65%
06:00 3@ 75%
Hold 3 Sets
09:00 3 @ 85%
12:00 3 @ 85%
15:00 3 @ 85%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 Rounds for time - 28 min time cap
500/400m row
50 Double Unders
25 Wall Balls
10 HSPU or Box HPSU
5 Deadlifts @ 120/80kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Heavy posterior chain and leg fatigue today; build antagonists and arm hypertrophy without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 3 by 3 at 85 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 500/400m row, 50 Double Unders, 25 Wall Balls, 10 HSPU or Box HPSU, 5 Deadlifts @ 120/80kg. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, arms, rear delts.
